title: Could Gendo have triggered Third Impact while Kaworu was alive
display_title: Could Gendo have triggered Third Impact while Kaworu was alive
wikitext:
[]: Could Gendo have triggered Third Impact while Kaworu was alive?             Quote Post by Sailor Haumea » Mon Jun 13, 2022 1:12 am This is an entirely hypothetical question, but one that I discussed with some people on a Discord server. Given that Kaworu has Adam's soul, could Gendo have even attempted to initiate Third Impact while Kaworu was still living (such as in a scenario where Kaworu hypothetically doesn't die in Episode 24 but somehow ceases to pursue returning to Adam), or was Adam's soul required to initiate Third Impact? Basically, would the Adam embryo on its own (without the soul) combining with Rei and Lilith have caused 3I as well?

[]: Re: Could Gendo have triggered Third Impact while Kaworu was alive?             Quote Post by Zoop » Mon Jun 13, 2022 4:02 am Third impact, yes, likely. Contact between lillim dna and adam dna seems to always have the potential to end catastrophically. Instrumentality? No, unlikely, at least not the way Gendo/Seele wants it to (it would most likely just wipe out remaining human life). Afaik, it's kinda the idea to replace adam with an eva so control can be taken of the impact and start instrumentality. If adam was still around, he (kaworu?) would be the one in control instead and unlikely to go the way Seele wants it to. Thats why all the angels need to be defeated first otherwise any of them would/could interfere with instrumentality. Gendo wanted to be in control, thats why he had adams embryo in his hand and was about to fuse with Rei / Lillith, but Rei betrayed him, took adams embryo and brought it to Shinji instead. Seele doesn't seem to care/know about the embryo tho, I think that the MP eva's were supposed to be a standin for that. So in the end, mp eva's = adam, eva-01 = lillith, together, is instrumentality. Gendo had the embryo so he could do his thing without Seele and their MP Eva's. But that didnt work out for Gendo ...

[]: Re: Could Gendo have triggered Third Impact while Kaworu was alive?             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Sep 07, 2022 2:32 pm If NGE2 is any indication, then yes.

[]: Re: Could Gendo have triggered Third Impact while Kaworu was alive?             Quote Post by WDS » Wed Sep 28, 2022 9:09 pm It's never entirely clear why all of the Angels need to be eliminated before Instrumentality/3I can happen. It could be mechanical, or it could be purely ceremonial. You never know with those wacky SEELE guys.

[]: Re: Could Gendo have triggered Third Impact while Kaworu was alive?             Quote Post by sithsauron » Wed Sep 28, 2022 11:47 pm The angel elimination requirement seems to be based on some set-in-stone prophecy in the dead sea scrolls. There is no explanation of why or how this prophecy functions, or if it's FAR instruction manual why they would make it act as a prophecy as well. Yui stated to Fuyutsuki that they knew 3rd impact was gonna happen no matter what.

[]: Re: Could Gendo have triggered Third Impact while Kaworu was alive?             Quote Post by WDS » Thu Sep 29, 2022 1:21 pm sithsauron wrote: The angel elimination requirement seems to be based on some set-in-stone prophecy in the dead sea scrolls. There is no explanation of why or how this prophecy functions, or if it's FAR instruction manual why they would make it act as a prophecy as well. Yui stated to Fuyutsuki that they knew 3rd impact was gonna happen no matter what.
